products.name: Riso Carnaroli
pros: Italian excellence with large, tapered grains
Excellent absorption of sauces, ideal for risotto

products.name: Riso Basmati
pros: Long, slender grains with distinctive aroma
Originates from India/Pakistan, known for fluffy texture
Suitable for aromatic dishes and salads

trustedSourceSummary: No official consumer documents were found in the last 60 days, so the latest available official sources from 2025-2026 were used. Organizations used: Altroconsumo. Altroconsumo’s November 2025 lab tests recommend Riso Carnaroli and Riso Basmati as top picks, highlighting their quality and suitability for specific dishes.
